style_effects: Constant static sparks flicker in electric blue and white, dancing erratically around Blastoise's shell and limbs like miniature lightning bolts. A pulsing electromagnetic aura radiates in vibrant cyan, distorting the air with subtle shimmering waves, while its eyes and tail emit a steady, intense blue-white glow that casts sharp, dynamic shadows. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
